message:
feat(db): add ATC policy engine read path — query_rollups + query_open_experiences (br-bn0vb.26)

New atc_queries module provides rate-limited read-only access to the
ATC learning ledger for the policy engine tick:

- query_rollups(): reads all rollup rows via dedicated canonical
  connection (file-backed) or pool (in-memory), avoiding write-path
  contention
- query_open_experiences(filter): reads non-terminal experiences with
  optional subsystem/subject/project filtering and limit
- RollupEntry: typed struct replacing the tuple AtcRollupRow for
  policy consumption
- OpenExperienceSummary: lightweight projection (no feature vectors
  or outcome payloads) for state estimation

Promotes open_canonical_atc_conn, canonical_query_atc_rows, and
close_canonical_db_conn to pub(crate) for cross-module reuse.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
